body: Implemented axon-esf leaf crate and axon-schema integration. Adversarial plan converged at round 8; implementation review converged at round 2 after tightening IndexDeclaration compound-key validation. Checks passed: cargo test -p axon-esf; cargo test -p axon-schema; cargo run -p axon-esf --release --example compiled_schema_perf (215 ns avg); axon-esf cargo-tree negative dependency check; cargo check; cargo clippy -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --check; cargo test --workspace --exclude axon-storage. Full cargo test was attempted and failed only in axon-storage Postgres tests because PostgreSQL test provisioning timed out waiting for a pool connection in this environment.
